description: Show a card with stats for a single GitHub repository

pat.description: Reuses the same token configured for the GitHub plugin, if you already have one.
pat.label: GitHub Classic Token

banner_variant.description: Choose how big and prominent the banner is
banner_variant.label: Style

banner.description: Header banner with owner avatar, repository name and description, tinted by the primary language
banner.name: Banner

max_languages.label: Maximum languages
max_languages.tooltip: Languages beyond this limit are omitted from the breakdown bar.

max_topics.label: Maximum topics
max_topics.tooltip: Topics beyond this limit are summarized as '+N more'.

insights.description: Star and fork counters, a real star-growth graph, language breakdown and topics
insights.name: Insights

max_languages.label: Maximum languages
max_languages.tooltip: Languages beyond this limit are omitted from the breakdown bar.

languages.description: Language/technology breakdown bar, by bytes of code
languages.name: Technologies

max_topics.label: Maximum topics
max_topics.tooltip: Topics beyond this limit are summarized as '+N more'.

repository_card.description: Compact card with name, description, language, stars, forks, license and topics
repository_card.name: Repository Card

star_graph.description: A real graph of the repository's star growth over time
star_graph.name: Star Growth Graph

max_topics.label: Maximum topics
max_topics.tooltip: Topics beyond this limit are summarized as '+N more'.
